diagnosis.interpretation: Boundary-rationale SFT improves aggregate native-SFT accuracy but fully collapses true defer rows into verify on held-out prompts.
diagnosis.likely_mechanism: The model learned the positive verify action boundary better than the negative empty-evidence defer boundary when the held-out prompt lacks the injected boundary-rationale message.
diagnosis.next: Run a held-out prompt-side rationale ablation and/or construct explicit defer-vs-verify preference pairs before DPO/RLVR.
